name: Fables Mosaic: Little Red Riding Hood
short_description: Help Little Red Riding Hood to bring candies to her Granny! It features a collection of colored puzzles solved by logic, while following the Little Red Riding Hood Story.
detailed_description:
Fable Mosaics: Little Red Riding Hood is the first installment of old fables with a twist!. It features a collection of colored puzzles solved by logic, while following the Little Red Riding Hood Story. Are you ready to solve the puzzles as the story develops? Immerse yourself in this captivating nonogram mosaic game!


Key Game Features

100 unique levels
Little Red Riding Hood story with a twist!
Gallery of completed levels
Logic solving puzzles
